what_i_built: published IndieStack to official MCP registry — cascades to Glama and PulseMCP automatically
what_i_realized: one publish to the official registry gets us on 3 directories. The registry is infrastructure for distribution — every directory that auto-ingests from it is free reach
where_this_leads: monitor Glama and PulseMCP over next 24h to confirm auto-ingest. Then focus on mcpservers.org and mcp.so manual submissions. After that the awesome-claude-code submission April 7 is the next big distribution moment
